# Repository map

> Auto-generated by `scripts/generate-map.js` from `paths-manifest.json`. Do not edit by hand.
>
> Knowledge version: **0.16.0**.

This is the orientation map for the repo. For the human-readable summary + status, see `README.md`. For the machine-readable contract, see `paths-manifest.json`.

## Domains

### `foundations/`

- **`foundations.md`** _[human]_ — `foundations/src/foundations.md`
  - Master reference for Actian DS — primitives, tokens, scales (Design system lead, MD-as-SoT).
- **`foundations.authoring`** _[human]_ — `foundations/src/AUTHORING.md`
  - How to edit foundations.md (UX team guide).
- **`foundations.bundle`** _[ci]_ — `foundations/dist/foundations.bundle.json`
  - Full nested foundations tree (hierarchical Pattern H roll-up).
- **`foundations.index`** _[ci]_ — `foundations/dist/_index.json`
  - Root foundations metadata + top-level child list.
- **`foundations.source`** _[ci]_ — `foundations/dist/foundations.md`
  - Verbatim copy of foundations/src/foundations.md (Stripe .md URL pattern).
- **`foundations.color-primitives`** _[ci]_ — `foundations/dist/color-primitives/_index.json`
  - Hierarchical _index for foundations section 'Color Primitives'.
- **`foundations.tokens.index`** _[ci]_ — `foundations/dist/tokens/_index.json`
  - Hierarchical _index for foundations section 'Tokens'.
- **`foundations.tokens.motion`** _[ci]_ — `foundations/dist/tokens/motion.json`
  - Motion patterns (durations, easings, named patterns) — consumed by per-category motion_refs resolution in the docs site and the plugin's component-brief skill.
- **`foundations.design-guidelines`** _[ci]_ — `foundations/dist/design-guidelines/_index.json`
  - Hierarchical _index for foundations section 'Design Guidelines'.
- **`foundations.leaf`** _(collection)_ _[ci]_ — `foundations/dist`
  - Per-leaf foundations JSONs in hierarchical Pattern H layout.

### `tokens/`

- **`tokens.json`** _[human]_ — `tokens/tokens.json`
  - DTCG W3C-format design tokens (frozen snapshot until successor generator returns).
- **`tokens.css`** _[human]_ — `tokens/tokens.css`
  - CSS custom properties (--zen-*) — frozen snapshot.
- **`tokens.reference`** _[ci]_ — `tokens/token-reference.md`
  - Human-readable token catalog (auto-generated from tokens.json).

### `components/`

- **`components.registries.dskit`** _[ci]_ — `components/dist/registries/dskit.json`
  - DS Kit component registry (Figma REST sync).
- **`components.categories`** _[ci]_ — `components/dist/categories.json`
  - DS Kit component category groupings (Action, Form (input & selection), Navigation, Data Display, Feedback, Overlays) derived from the Figma Pages panel naming convention.
- **`components.registries.fmkit`** _[ci]_ — `components/dist/registries/fmkit.json`
  - FM (wireframe) Kit component registry (Figma REST sync).
- **`components.registries.metakit`** _[hybrid]_ — `components/dist/registries/metakit.json`
  - Meta Kit component registry — templates block hand-curated, preserved across syncs.
- **`components.registries.styles`** _[ci]_ — `components/dist/registries/meta-kit/styles.json`
  - DS Kit text + effect styles (Figma REST sync).
- **`components.styles.text`** _[ci]_ — `components/dist/text-styles.md`
  - DS Kit text styles (human-readable catalog).
- **`components.styles.effect`** _[ci]_ — `components/dist/effect-styles.md`
  - DS Kit effect (shadow, blur) styles.
- **`components.iconGroups`** _[human]_ — `components/src/icon-groups.json`
  - Icon → semantic group mapping (ζ.5).
- **`components.categoryDefaults.bundle`** _[ci]_ — `components/dist/categories/categories.bundle.json`
  - Roll-up of all 6 category-defaults JSONs keyed by slug.
- **`components.categoryDefaults.action`** _[ci]_ — `components/dist/categories/action-defaults.json`
  - Per-category structural defaults (anatomy, variants, motion refs, a11y refs) for the 'action' category.

### `content/`

- **`content.globalMd`** _[ci]_ — `content/dist/global.md`
  - Global / cross-cutting content guidelines only (voice, tone, capitalization, words to avoid, UX-pattern topics, Actian product-surface rules) — auto-generated from content/src/{writing,patterns,product}/*.md plus root-level meta files.
- **`content.section`** _(collection)_ _[human]_ — `content/src`
  - Global / cross-cutting content guidelines (Content lead).

### `accessibility/`

- **`accessibility.guide`** _[human]_ — `accessibility/accessibility.md`
  - WCAG 2.2 AA guidance for the Actian DS.
- **`accessibility.index`** _[ci]_ — `accessibility/dist/a11y-index.json`
  - Slug → WCAG mapping for accessibility sections; consumed by Phase 2 category defaults + future MCP server.

## Coverage / debt

See `components/dist/guidelines/coverage.md` — the documentation-debt matrix (auto-generated).

## Consumers

- **Actian DS Claude plugin** — pins a snapshot of this repo via `vendor-snapshot.yml`; consumes the manifest contract.
- **Docs site** (in development) — reads via the same manifest.
- **External / future AI agents** — `.md` URL pattern planned for next phase.
